# Quickler Reports

> Quickler Ltd builds Quickler Reports, a chat-first technical reporting product for teams that capture information on site and rewrite it later into formal reports.

## Product

Quickler Reports helps technical teams turn site notes, photos, and voice into finished reports faster. It is designed for repeated reporting workflows where evidence is captured in the field and rewritten later at a desk.

### Best-fit users
- Structural engineers
- Surveyors
- Site inspectors
- Compliance professionals
- Technical teams with repeated reporting workflows

## Contact

Legal name: Quickler Ltd
Registered office: 5 South Charlotte Street, Edinburgh, EH2 4AN
Website: https://quickler.co/
Contact page: https://quickler.co/pages/contact.html

## Proof

- Delivered workflow projects have saved clients 51.5 working days per year in aggregate.
- Average measured return on build time is 12x.
- Previous delivered work includes reporting automation, production tracking, sales-data restructuring, and grant-application workflow improvements.

## Background

Quickler Ltd was founded by Philip Ross. He studied Electrical and Mechanical Engineering at the University of Strathclyde and previously worked at Dijuno, where he built experience in LLM testing, prompt engineering, and Python automation.

## Technologies

Python, Flask, Typst, Google Apps Script, Claude, Looker Studio, Docker Compose
